title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 7 - Moving (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introductory computer science course covering artificial intelligence and programming. Chapter 7 focuses on moving and is taught by Brian Yu. The course is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
writeup: This live, unedited CS50 session, led by Brian Yu, presents Chapter 7 ("Moving") of Harvard's introduction to artificial intelligence, part of the broader computer science course associated with David J. Malan. The chapter situates its AI material within CS50's curriculum, which reaches learners through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare. The summary does not detail the specific concepts covered under the "Moving" topic.
